description: Create a content slide with a left sidebar and a world region comparison showing 2020 vs 2050 median age and old-age dependency ratios by region using a map-style infographic and a right-hand explanatory text panel.

header.headline: All regions are aging, with fewer people of working age having to support more older people – Interregional differences remain significant
header.sub: Median age [years] and old-age dependency ratio by region 2020 vs. 2050 [people 65+ / 100 people 20-64]

main.title: Regional aging comparison
main.body: World map-style infographic comparing regions on two measures for 2020 vs. 2050: median age shown as paired bars and old-age dependency ratio shown as paired circles. Visible values include Northern America median age 38.6 vs. 43.0 and old-age dependency ratio 29 vs. 41; Europe median age 42.5 vs. 46.8.

items.text: Explanatory notes panel on the right summarizing implications of population aging across regions.
